humanEffortEstimate.rationale: Recovery setup completion required Azure task recovery, stash restoration review, baseline build verification, audit triage, and blocked-state reporting for Sprint 2 handoff.

frameworkObservations.observation: The delegation prompt referenced project-local Azure Boards scripts, but the operational scripts were only available from the framework repository path during recovery.
frameworkObservations.suggestion: Clarify bridge-repo delegation prompts so Azure Boards commands always reference the framework-owned script location or confirm mirrored project-local script availability.
